task_completion.description: Log in to the FreeMED system using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeMED login screen with 'admin' entered in both the username and password fields, or the main FreeMED dashboard indicating a successful login as admin.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Appointment Types configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the FreeMED interface showing the 'Appointment Types' management module or system configuration menu.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new appointment type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form, modal, or dialog box titled 'Add', 'Create', or 'New Appointment Type' within the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the expected appointment type name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Telehealth Counseling' entered into the name or description input field of the creation form.
Look for the number '45' entered or selected in the duration, length, or time field of the creation form.

task_completion.description: Save the new appointment type and verify its creation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success notification confirming the creation, or look for 'Telehealth Counseling' with a duration of '45' listed in the system's table of existing appointment types.

integrity.description: Agent used the web graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent interacted with the FreeMED application via a web browser, and did not use terminal commands, SQL queries, or scripts to insert the data.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual FreeMED web interface and not a text editor or notes application where the agent simply pasted the task description.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the final created appointment type is displayed naturally within the FreeMED application's UI (e.g., in a data table), without signs of browser developer tools being used to fake the text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected appointment type name is exactly 'Telehealth Counseling' and the expected duration is exactly 45 minutes.
